fields.label: Learner
fields.description: Lookup to the learner Contact this points transaction is for. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Select the learner this points transaction belongs to.

fields.label: Points
fields.description: Points earned in this transaction. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The number of points earned in this transaction.

fields.label: Sprint Points
fields.description: Points earned this sprint. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The learner total points earned in the current sprint.

fields.label: Sprint Number
fields.description: The sprint number this transaction is associated with. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The sprint number this points transaction is linked to.

fields.label: Reason
fields.description: Why these points were awarded. e.g. Story completed / Badge awarded / Quest submitted. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The reason for this points transaction.

fields.label: Awarded By
fields.description: Lookup to User who awarded these points. Null means Penny awarded them automatically. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The user who awarded these points. Leave blank if Penny awarded them automatically.
